### Corresponding Rmd for SCM.stan
#### Started on 27/06/2026


Will include data formatting, pre_var function, data list, model compiling, model fitting, convergence checks (?), coefficient extraction, intervention effects, and some plots.



**Libraries**
```{r}
library(cmdstanr)
library(posterior)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(bayesplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(EValue)
```

**Dataset**
```{r}
data <- read.csv("data.csv")
df <- data
#avoiding full 1
df <- df |>
  mutate(biofouling = if_else(
    biofouling == 0, 
    0,                                             
    (biofouling * (n() - 1) + 0.5) / n()           
  ))
# 0-1 zib can only handle 0-1
df$biofouling <- df$biofouling / 100

#2 most important zooplankton
df <- df %>%
  mutate(pred_zoo = copepoda + arrow_worm)
#temporary
df <- df %>% 
  mutate(nutrients =  NO2_um + NO3_um + PO4_um)

df <- df %>%
  rename(current = current_velocity_w17) %>%
  rename(seaweed_growth = blade_length) %>%
  rename(salinity = Salinity) %>%
  rename(precipitation = precipitation_mm_w17) %>%
  rename(daylight = daylight_duration_h_w17) %>%
  rename(sst = sea_surface_temperature_c_w17) %>%
  rename(phyto = total_phytoplankton) %>%
  rename(cyphonautes = cyphonaute) %>%
  rename(air_temp = avg_temp_w17)

#scaling
df <- df |>
  mutate(across(c(nutrients, phyto, seaweed_growth, current,
                  air_temp, sst, daylight, salinity,
                  pred_zoo, precipitation, cyphonautes),
                ~ scale(.)[,1]))
```

```{r}
#Splits each variable into its missing and observed values
#streamlined
prep_var <- function(x) {
  obs_idx  <- which(!is.na(x))
  miss_idx <- which(is.na(x))
  list(
    n_obs    = length(obs_idx),
    n_miss   = length(miss_idx),
    obs_idx  = obs_idx,
    miss_idx = miss_idx,
    obs_vals = x[obs_idx],
    imp_mean = mean(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    imp_sd   = sd(x,   na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

```

**'Preparing' Variables**
```{r}
pv_airtemp <- prep_var(df$air_temp)
```



**Model datalist**
```{r}

```
